name: Suspicious PowerShell Keywords
notes:
This rule detects keywords that could indicate the use of some PowerShell exploitation framework

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Perez Diego (@darkquassar), Tuan Le (NCSGroup)
SIGMA Title: Potential Suspicious PowerShell Keywords
SIGMA Description: Detects potentially suspicious keywords that could indicate the use of a PowerShell exploitation framework


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success, System.Process Creation Success, Exploit.Command Execution

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reflection.assembly.load%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reflection.assembly]::load%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reflection.assemblyname%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reflection.emit.assemblybuilderaccess%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%runtime.interopservices.dllimportattribute%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%invoke-wmimethod%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%new-inmemorymodule%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%add-win32type%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%psenum%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%definedynamicassembly%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%definedynamicmodule%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reflection.typeattributes%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reflection.emit.opcodes%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reflection.emit.customattributebuilder%' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious PowerShell Keywords on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success, System.Process Creation Success, Exploit.Command Execution

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reflection.assembly.load%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reflection.assembly]::load%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reflection.assemblyname%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reflection.emit.assemblybuilderaccess%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%runtime.interopservices.dllimportattribute%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%invoke-wmimethod%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%new-inmemorymodule%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%add-win32type%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%psenum%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%definedynamicassembly%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%definedynamicmodule%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reflection.typeattributes%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reflection.emit.opcodes%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reflection.emit.customattributebuilder%' ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects keywords that could indicate the use of some PowerShell exploitation framework
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
